email_body:
Dear Mr. Demirci,

I am writing to apply for the Medewerker Wafelbeleving position at The Waffle Heritage. As a junior digital marketer with a passion for Belgian culture and gastronomy, I am excited about the opportunity to welcome international visitors and share the story of Belgian waffles.

While my background is in digital marketing, I have strong communication skills and enjoy working with people from different cultures. I am fluent in English and Turkish, and I am currently learning Dutch. I am reliable, punctual, and eager to learn. I have basic cooking skills and am comfortable preparing and baking fresh waffles.

I am based in Zwijndrecht, near Antwerp, and available for the part-time schedule. I would love to contribute to creating an authentic cultural experience for your guests.

Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to hearing from you.

Best regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Dear Mr. Demirci,

I am writing to express my enthusiasm for the Medewerker Wafelbeleving position at The Waffle Heritage. As someone who deeply appreciates Belgian culture and gastronomy, I am drawn to the opportunity to welcome international visitors and share the rich history of Belgian waffles in an authentic, small-group setting.

Although my professional background is in digital marketing, I have developed strong communication and presentation skills through my work. At Episto, I regularly create content and interact with clients, which has honed my ability to explain complex topics clearly and engagingly. I am confident in speaking to groups and enjoy connecting with people from diverse cultural backgrounds.

I am fluent in English and Turkish, and I am actively learning Dutch (currently at A2 level). I am reliable, punctual, and eager to learn new skills. I have basic cooking experience and am comfortable in a kitchen environment. I am excited about the prospect of learning to bake and serve fresh waffles while providing a warm welcome to visitors.

I am based in Zwijndrecht, near Antwerp, and available for the part-time schedule of 10 hours per week over two days. I am drawn to The Waffle Heritage's unique concept that combines tourism and gastronomy, and I would be proud to contribute to your team.

Thank you for considering my application. I would welcome the opportunity to discuss how my enthusiasm and interpersonal skills can benefit your team.

Warm regards,
Baver Ok
cv_highlights:
Friendly and confident communicator with experience presenting information to diverse audiences.
Fluent in English and Turkish, with basic Dutch (A2) – ideal for welcoming international visitors.
Reliable and punctual, with a strong work ethic demonstrated in logistics and team environments.
Interest in Belgian culture and gastronomy, eager to share the story of Belgian waffles.
Basic cooking skills and comfort in a kitchen setting, ready to learn waffle preparation.
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Enthusiastic and friendly communicator with a passion for Belgian culture and gastronomy. Experienced in presenting information to diverse audiences and creating engaging experiences. Reliable and punctual, with a strong work ethic and eagerness to learn. Fluent in English and Turkish, with basic Dutch. Comfortable in a kitchen environment and ready to contribute to an authentic waffle-tasting experience.

CORE SKILLS
- Communication & Presentation: Confident speaking to groups, explaining cultural and historical topics clearly and engagingly.
- Customer Service: Friendly, welcoming, and attentive to guest needs; experienced in creating positive interactions.
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (A2, in progress).
- Reliability & Punctuality: Proven track record in fast-paced environments requiring accuracy and timeliness.
- Basic Cooking & Kitchen Skills: Comfortable with food preparation and maintaining a clean workspace.
- Adaptability: Quick learner, comfortable with new tools and environments.

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings.
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic.
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates.
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions.

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment.

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript).

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook).
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO).
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score.

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
